title: Climate scrubbed from G7 meeting to appease US, host France says
summary_full: The office of France's ecology minister said the two-day meeting would focus on "less contentious issues" in an effort to appease the most powerful G7 member
summary_public: The office of France's ecology minister said the two-day meeting would focus on "less contentious issues" in an effort to appease the most powerful G7 member

FR.label: neutral
